features.title: Bootstrap spec system (markdown → compiled JSON registry)
Registry consumer MVP (read-only spec runtime surface)
Feature lifecycle & status semantics (registry status model)
Registry consumer status-report JSON contract tests
Registry consumer shared JSON serialization helper
Registry consumer list/show JSON contract tests
Registry consumer README examples contract MVP
Registry consumer field-shape invariants contract MVP
Registry consumer help/usage output contract MVP
Registry consumer flag-conflict and argument-validation contract MVP
Registry consumer stderr/stdout channel discipline contract MVP
Registry consumer change classification and contract-governance gate MVP
Registry consumer internal output/exit refactor MVP
Registry consumer list ids-only contract MVP
axiomregent sidecar activation and governance surface
